Title: User Registration - Personal Account
Preconditions: Browser open, QA environment: FRONT_URL, cleared cache/cookies
Steps:
1. Navigate to storefront homepage
2. Click 'Sign Up' in header
3. Select 'Personal' account type
4. Fill required fields: First Name, Last Name, Email: testuser-{timestamp}@example.com, Password: TestP@ss123!
5. Accept terms and conditions
6. Click 'Create Account' button
7. Verify confirmation page displays
Expected Result:
- Registration form submits successfully
- Confirmation page displays success message
- User can sign in with new credentials
- Account visible in Admin panel under Customers
- Profile displays correct personal information

Title: User Registration - Organization Account
Preconditions: Browser open, QA environment accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Select 'Organization' account type
3. Fill required fields: Company Name, Admin name, Email, Password
4. Accept terms and conditions
5. Click 'Create Account'
6. Log in with new credentials
7. Verify organization context
Expected Result:
- Organization account created successfully
- Company appears in Organizations list in Admin
- User assigned as organization administrator
- Organization name visible in storefront header
- B2B features accessible: Company Members, Quick Order

Title: Sign In - Personal User
Preconditions: Valid personal user account: USER_EMAIL from .env
Steps:
1. Navigate to FRONT_URL
2. Click 'Sign In' in header
3. Enter email: USER_EMAIL and password: USER_PASSWORD
4. Click 'Sign In' button
5. Verify successful authentication
Expected Result:
- User authenticated successfully
- User name displayed in header
- Cart icon accessible
- Account menu shows Logout option
- No error messages displayed

Title: Sign In - Organization User
Preconditions: Valid organization user account exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter organization user email and password
3. Click 'Sign In'
4. Verify organization context active
5. Check B2B features available
Expected Result:
- User logged in with organization context
- Organization name visible in header
- B2B features accessible: Quick Order, Company Members, Quotes
- Pricing reflects organization contracts if configured
- Cart specific to organization (BL-B2B-001)

Title: Forgot Password - Reset Flow
Preconditions: Valid user account exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Click 'Forgot Password?' link
3. Enter registered email address
4. Click 'Send Reset Link'
5. Check email for password reset link
6. Click reset link and enter new password
7. Log in with new password
8. Verify old password no longer works
Expected Result:
- Reset link email received within 2 minutes
- Password reset form accepts strong passwords
- Password reset completes with confirmation message
- Can sign in with new password; old password rejected
- Reset link expires after use (BL-AUTH-003)

Title: Sign Out and Session Revocation
Preconditions: User logged in
Steps:
1. Click user name/account menu in header
2. Click 'Sign Out'
3. Verify sign-out completed
4. Attempt to access /account/orders directly
Expected Result:
- User signed out successfully
- Account menu no longer shows user name
- Attempting account pages redirects to sign-in
- Session token revoked (protected API calls return 401)

Title: Account Lockout After Failed Login Attempts
Preconditions: Valid user account exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter correct email with wrong password 5 times in succession
3. Attempt 6th login with correct credentials
4. Verify lockout behavior
Expected Result:
- Account locked after N consecutive failures (platform default: 5)
- Even correct credentials rejected during lockout with generic message
- Lockout message does not reveal whether account exists
- Successful login prior to threshold resets failure counter (BL-AUTH-003)

Title: Catalog Browsing - Category Navigation
Preconditions: User logged in
Steps:
1. Navigate to main catalog from header menu
2. Hover over main category
3. Verify subcategories display
4. Click on subcategory
5. Verify category page loads
6. Check breadcrumbs and product listing
Expected Result:
- Main categories load in header/menu
- Subcategories display on hover/click
- Category page loads with correct products
- Breadcrumbs show correct hierarchy
- Product count displayed
- Facets/filters display in sidebar
- Products show image, name, price, Add to Cart

Title: Catalog - Faceted Filters (Multi-Filter Apply)
Preconditions: User on category page with filterable products
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Verify facets display (Brand, Price, Size, Color)
3. Select Brand filter
4. Verify results update and count changes
5. Apply Price range filter
6. Verify chip badges show active filters
7. Click X on one chip to remove it
8. Verify no-results case with conflicting filters
Expected Result:
- Facets display available values
- Applying filter updates product listing immediately
- Product count updates after each filter
- Multiple filters work together (AND logic)
- Chip badges display for active filters
- Removing chip updates results
- Facet counts match filtered results (BL-SRCH-001)
- Empty state shows 'No products match' message

Title: Catalog - Sort Products
Preconditions: User on category page with multiple products
Steps:
1. Navigate to category page
2. Select 'Price: Low to High' in sort dropdown
3. Verify products sorted ascending
4. Select 'Price: High to Low'
5. Verify descending sort
6. Apply a filter and verify sort persists
Expected Result:
- Sort options available: Price (Low-High, High-Low), Name (A-Z, Z-A), Newest
- Sorting applies immediately
- Sort order maintained after filter applied (ECL-3.2)
- Pagination resets to page 1 on sort change

Title: Product Search - Basic Query and Suggestions
Preconditions: User logged in, products exist in catalog
Steps:
1. Click on search bar in header
2. Start typing 'lapt'
3. Verify autocomplete suggestions appear
4. Press Enter to search 'laptop'
5. Verify search results page loads with result count
6. Verify filters available to refine
Expected Result:
- Suggestions update after 2-3 characters
- Search results page displays matching products
- Result count shown
- Products display with image, name, price, Add to Cart
- Filters available on search results
- Breadcrumbs: Home > Search Results (BL-SRCH-004)

Title: Product Search - No Results Handling
Preconditions: User on search page
Steps:
1. Enter nonsense search term: 'xyzabc123notfound'
2. Press Enter
3. Verify no results handling
4. Verify search term visible in bar
Expected Result:
- 'No results found for xyzabc123notfound' message shown
- Suggestions shown: 'Try different keywords' or 'Browse categories'
- Page layout intact (no broken grid)
- Search bar filled with term
- No 500 errors (BL-SRCH-002)

Title: Product Search - Special Characters and XSS
Preconditions: User on search page
Steps:
1. Enter: '<script>alert()</script>' in search
2. Press Enter
3. Enter: 'laptop & monitor'
4. Verify search handles both queries
Expected Result:
- XSS attempts sanitized (no script execution)
- Special characters handled gracefully
- No server errors
- Query escaped in URL (BL-SRCH-005)

Title: Search Index Lag - Admin Change Reflects Within 120s
Preconditions: Admin access, product in catalog
Steps:
1. Update product name in Admin
2. Immediately search on storefront (may show old name - expected within 60s)
3. Verify direct product URL shows new name immediately
4. Wait 120 seconds
5. Re-run search
6. Verify new name appears in results
Expected Result:
- PDP (direct URL) shows updated name immediately (live data)
- Search results update within 120s after reindex
- After 120s no stale data remains (BL-CAT-003, BL-CROSS-009)

Title: Add to Cart - From Product Page
Preconditions: User logged in, product available
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Verify product details load (name, image, price)
3. Verify quantity selector defaults to 1
4. Click 'Add to Cart'
5. Verify success notification
6. Verify cart icon count increments
Expected Result:
- Product detail page loads fully
- 'Add to Cart' button enabled (if in stock)
- Success notification shows product name
- Cart icon count increments
- Product visible in cart

Title: Add to Cart - Product Variations (Correct SKU)
Preconditions: Configurable product with variations. DevTools Network tab open.
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with size and color variations
2. Verify 'Add to Cart' disabled until all required options selected
3. Select Size: Medium and Color: Blue
4. Click 'Add to Cart'
5. In Network tab: locate addItem GraphQL mutation
6. Verify request payload SKU matches Blue/M variant
7. View cart and verify line item shows 'Color: Blue, Size: M'
Expected Result:
- 'Add to Cart' disabled until all required attributes selected
- Selecting options enables the button
- addItem mutation sends correct variant SKU (not parent SKU)
- Cart line item displays variant attributes: 'Color: Blue, Size: M'
- Price matches selected variant
- Cart badge increments (BL-CAT-006)

Title: Add Same SKU Twice - Quantity Increments (No Duplicate Line)
Preconditions: User logged in, product available
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Click 'Add to Cart' (qty=1)
3. Return to listing page
4. Add same product again
5. View cart
Expected Result:
- Cart shows 1 line item with qty=2, not 2 separate lines
- Quantity incremented on re-add
- Line total = unit price x 2 (BL-CART-007)

Title: Cart - View and Update Quantities
Preconditions: Multiple products in cart
Steps:
1. Add 2-3 products to cart
2. Navigate to full cart page
3. Verify cart displays all items with image, name, SKU, qty, line total
4. Click '+' to increase quantity of one item
5. Verify line total and subtotal recalculate
6. Click '-' to decrease quantity
7. Decrease to 0 and verify item removed
Expected Result:
- Full cart shows all items with image, name, qty selector, line total
- Subtotal, shipping placeholder, grand total displayed
- Line total = unit price x quantity (BL-PRICE-008)
- Subtotal updates on quantity change
- Decreasing to 0 removes item or minus button disabled at 1

Title: Cart - Remove Item
Preconditions: Multiple products in cart
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click remove/trash icon on one item
3. Verify item removed
4. Verify totals recalculate
5. Remove all items and verify empty state
Expected Result:
- Item disappears from cart immediately
- Cart totals recalculate
- If cart empty: 'Your cart is empty' message with continue shopping link

Title: Cart - Stock Limit Enforced (Max Qty = Available Stock)
Preconditions: Product with limited stock (e.g., 5 units available)
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with limited stock
2. Enter quantity 999 in quantity input field
3. Attempt to add to cart
Expected Result:
- Quantity capped to available stock or error shown: 'Only X available'
- Order cannot exceed available inventory
- '+' button disabled at stock limit (BL-CART-001)

Title: Cart - Out-of-Stock Product Cannot Be Added
Preconditions: Admin access. Product with all FFC inventory set to 0.
Steps:
1. In Admin: set all fulfillment center stock to 0 for a product
2. Navigate to product on storefront
3. Observe stock label and Add to Cart button
4. Attempt to add via xAPI if UI blocks
Expected Result:
- 'Out of stock' or 'Sold out' label shown on PDP and listing
- 'Add to Cart' disabled/hidden
- xAPI addToCart returns error for zero-stock product (BL-CAT-001)

Title: Cart - Price N/A Prevents Purchase ($0 Guard)
Preconditions: Admin access. Product with price removed or set to 0.
Steps:
1. In Admin: remove price from product (delete price list entry)
2. Navigate to product on storefront
3. Observe price and Add to Cart state
Expected Result:
- Product shows 'Unavailable' or N/A price — NOT $0.00
- 'Add to Cart' button disabled
- Product cannot be purchased at $0 (BL-CROSS-001, BL-CROSS-012)

Title: Cart - Promo Code Valid Application
Preconditions: Valid promo code available (e.g., SAVE10). Products in cart.
Steps:
1. Add products to cart
2. Navigate to cart
3. Enter valid code: SAVE10
4. Click 'Apply'
5. Verify discount applied
6. Verify discount calculated on sale price not list price
Expected Result:
- Valid code applies discount
- Discount line appears: 'Promo Code (SAVE10): -$X.XX'
- Percentage coupon applies to already-discounted (sale) price, not list price
- Grand total reduced correctly (BL-CART-003, BL-PRICE-001)

Title: Cart - Invalid Promo Code Rejected
Preconditions: On cart page with products
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Enter invalid code: INVALID123
3. Click 'Apply'
4. Verify error
Expected Result:
- Error message: 'Invalid promo code' or 'Code not found'
- No discount applied
- Cart totals unchanged

Title: Cart - Pack Size Validation
Preconditions: Product sold in packs of 6
Steps:
1. Navigate to product with pack size = 6
2. Enter quantity = 7
3. Attempt to add to cart
Expected Result:
- Quantity rejected or auto-rounded to nearest pack (6 or 12)
- Stepper increments by pack size (BL-CART-006)

Title: Cart - Currency Switch Recalculates All Prices
Preconditions: Multi-currency configured. Products in cart.
Steps:
1. Add items to cart in USD
2. Switch currency to EUR (or other configured currency)
3. Verify all cart line items recalculate to EUR prices
4. Verify shipping and tax also in EUR
5. Check a product not in new currency's price list
Expected Result:
- All prices switch to new currency's price list (not exchange rate conversion)
- Cart subtotal, shipping, tax all in new currency
- Products without new-currency prices show 'Unavailable' or removed
- No mixed-currency state in cart (BL-CART-004, BL-CROSS-004)

Title: Cart - Persistence Across Sign-Out / Sign-In
Preconditions: User logged in with items in cart
Steps:
1. Add 3 products to cart
2. Sign out
3. Sign back in
4. Verify cart restored
Expected Result:
- Cart restored with same items and quantities after re-login
- No items lost on sign-out/sign-in cycle (BL-CART-008)

Title: Checkout - Standard Delivery - Full Flow
Preconditions: Products in cart, shipping addresses configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Checkout'
3. Select 'Delivery' option
4. Select or add shipping address
5. Select shipping method
6. Select payment method
7. Review order summary
8. Click 'Place Order'
9. Verify order confirmation page
Expected Result:
- Checkout page loads with progress indicator
- Address form or selector displays
- Shipping methods display with cost and estimated delivery
- Payment methods available
- Order summary shows: Items, Subtotal, Shipping, Tax, Grand Total
- Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts (BL-CHK-006)
- Order processes successfully
- Confirmation page displays order number
- Cart cleared after order

Title: Checkout - BOPIS Pickup Location Selection
Preconditions: Products in cart, pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Checkout'
3. Select 'Pickup' option
4. Click 'Select pickup location'
5. Verify map modal opens with location list
6. Select a pickup location
7. Complete checkout without shipping address
Expected Result:
- 'Pickup' option available at checkout
- Map modal shows markers for all pickup locations
- Location details shown: Name, Address, Phone, Hours, Availability
- No shipping cost applied for pickup
- Shipping address step skipped
- Order confirmation shows pickup location and instructions
- Billing address still required (BL-SHIP-002)

Title: Checkout - Shipping Methods Update on Address Change
Preconditions: Checkout with delivery selected
Steps:
1. Enter domestic shipping address
2. Note available shipping methods and rates
3. Change to international address
4. Verify shipping methods refresh
5. Verify previously selected method deselected if unavailable
Expected Result:
- Shipping methods update when address changes
- Rates recalculate for new destination
- Method unavailable for new address is deselected with notification
- BOPIS option disappears for distant addresses (BL-CHK-005, BL-SHIP-001)

Title: Checkout - Free Shipping Threshold Recalculates on Cart Change
Preconditions: Store configured with free shipping threshold (e.g., $100). Cart near threshold.
Steps:
1. Add items totaling $90 to cart
2. Note shipping cost ($10 standard)
3. Add item worth $20 (total $110)
4. Verify shipping becomes $0 (free)
5. Apply coupon reducing total to $95
6. Verify free shipping removed
Expected Result:
- Shipping recalculates each time cart changes
- Free shipping triggered at threshold on subtotal after discounts
- Coupon reducing below threshold removes free shipping (BL-SHIP-003)

Title: Checkout - Order Total Formula Verified
Preconditions: User at final checkout review step before placing order
Steps:
1. Proceed through all checkout steps
2. At order review page, manually calculate: sum(line totals) + shipping + tax - discounts
3. Compare manual calculation to displayed grand total
4. After placing order, compare to confirmation page total
5. Verify Admin order shows same total
Expected Result:
- Grand total = subtotal + shipping + tax - cart discounts exactly
- Tax calculated on post-discount subtotal (BL-PRICE-002)
- No unexplained discrepancies >= $0.01 (BL-PRICE-008, BL-CHK-006)
- Checkout total matches confirmation page
- Confirmation matches Admin order detail

Title: Checkout - Place Order (Double-Submit Prevention)
Preconditions: User at final checkout step with payment ready
Steps:
1. Complete all checkout steps
2. Click 'Place Order'
3. Immediately click 'Place Order' again (rapid double-click)
4. Wait for processing
5. Check Admin for orders
Expected Result:
- Only 1 order created (not 2)
- Button disabled/loading state after first click
- No duplicate orders in Admin
- No double inventory decrement (BL-CHK-002, BL-CROSS-010)

Title: Checkout - Payment Credit Card (CyberSource)
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, CyberSource configured
Steps:
1. Proceed to payment step
2. Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)'
3. Wait for CyberSource iframe to load
4. Enter: card 4622943127013705, name John Smith, expiry 09/2029, CVV 838
5. Click 'Place Order'
Expected Result:
- CyberSource iframe loads (PCI-compliant, isolated)
- Card fields accept input
- No raw card data in HTML or browser storage
- Payment authorized or clear decline message shown
- If success: order confirmation with order number
- If declined: user can retry without losing cart (BL-CHK-004)

Title: Payment - Authorize.Net Valid Card
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, Authorize.Net configured
Steps:
1. Select 'Bank card (Authorize.Net)'
2. Enter test card: 4111111111111111, expiry 12/2025, CVV 123
3. Submit payment
Expected Result:
- Authorize.Net form loads
- Card accepted
- Payment processes
- Order confirmation or decline message shown

Title: Payment - Datatrans Valid Card (3D Secure)
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, Datatrans configured
Steps:
1. Select 'Bank card (Datatrans)'
2. Enter test card: 4242424242424242, expiry 12/2025, CVV 123
3. Enter OTP if prompted: DATATRANS_OTP from .env
4. Complete payment
Expected Result:
- Datatrans form loads (may redirect to /checkout/payment)
- OTP field appears if 3D Secure enabled
- Correct OTP authorizes payment
- Order placed with confirmation

Title: Payment - Skyflow Valid Card (PCI Tokenization)
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, Skyflow configured
Steps:
1. Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'
2. Enter: SKYFLOW_VISA, expiry SKYFLOW_EXPIRY, CVV SKYFLOW_CVV from .env
3. Submit payment
Expected Result:
- Skyflow secure form loads
- Card data tokenized before submission
- Only token sent to server (no raw PAN in requests)
- Order confirmation on success (BL-CHK-004)

Title: Payment - Invalid Card Rejected with Clear Error
Preconditions: Payment form ready (any processor)
Steps:
1. Enter invalid card: 1234567890123456
2. Fill other fields with valid data
3. Attempt to submit
Expected Result:
- Real-time validation on card number field
- Error message: 'Invalid card number'
- No payment attempted
- User can correct and retry without losing checkout state

Title: Payment - Secure Data Handling (PCI Compliance Check)
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step, DevTools open
Steps:
1. Inspect payment form
2. Verify credit card fields in iframe
3. Submit payment
4. Inspect network requests
5. Check browser storage (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies)
Expected Result:
- Payment form uses iframe (PCI DSS scope reduction)
- No raw card number in HTML
- No card data stored in browser storage
- Only tokenized data sent to server
- All communication over HTTPS
- No mixed content warnings (BL-CHK-004)

Title: Order Confirmation Page - Cross-Layer Verification
Preconditions: Order just placed successfully
Steps:
1. Complete checkout and place order
2. Capture order number from confirmation page
3. Verify confirmation page content
4. Check email inbox for confirmation
5. Navigate to account Order History
6. In Admin: verify order exists with matching total
7. Verify cart is empty after order
Expected Result:
- Confirmation page shows order number prominently
- Success message displayed
- Order details: items, shipping address, shipping method, payment, total
- Cart cleared (BL-CROSS-005)
- Confirmation email received within 5 minutes with matching data (BL-NOTIF-001, BL-NOTIF-002)
- Order appears in account Order History
- Admin order total matches confirmation total (BL-CHK-006)

Title: GA4 Purchase Event Fires on Order Confirmation
Preconditions: GA4 configured, Network tab open, DevTools console open
Steps:
1. Complete checkout and place order
2. On confirmation page, open DevTools > Network tab
3. Filter for 'google-analytics.com' or 'gtag' events
4. Find 'purchase' event
5. Inspect event parameters
Expected Result:
- purchase event fires exactly once on confirmation page load
- event.transaction_id matches displayed order number
- event.value matches order total (revenue)
- event.currency matches order currency
- event.tax, event.shipping included
- event.items array contains all ordered products with correct item_id, price, quantity
- No GA errors in console (BL-CROSS-005)

Title: GA4 Add to Cart and Begin Checkout Events
Preconditions: GA4 configured, Network tab open
Steps:
1. Navigate to product page
2. Click 'Add to Cart'
3. Verify 'add_to_cart' GA4 event in Network tab
4. Navigate to cart and click Checkout
5. Verify 'begin_checkout' event fired
Expected Result:
- add_to_cart event: currency, value, items[item_id, item_name, price, quantity]
- begin_checkout event: currency, value, items array with all cart products
- Both events visible in Network tab
- Data accurate (matches product/cart values)

Title: Order History - View and Reorder
Preconditions: User logged in with previous orders
Steps:
1. Navigate to account > Orders
2. Verify orders listed newest-first with status, date, total
3. Click 'View Details' on an order
4. Verify all order details present
5. Click 'Reorder All'
6. Verify products added to cart
Expected Result:
- Orders listed in reverse chronological order
- Each order: Order Number, Date, Status badge, Total
- Order details: items, address, shipping, payment, totals
- Actions: Reorder, Track Shipment, Print Invoice
- Reorder adds all items to cart
- Out-of-stock items on reorder show warning

Title: Order Status State Machine - Admin Processing
Preconditions: Placed order in Admin
Steps:
1. Place order in storefront
2. In Admin: open the order
3. Attempt to change payment: Pending → Captured (skipping Authorized)
4. Verify illegal transition rejected
5. Process through valid states: Pending → Authorized → Captured
6. Ship via: New → PickPack → Sent (with tracking number)
7. Verify storefront order status updates
Expected Result:
- Illegal state transitions rejected (cannot capture before authorize)
- Valid transitions accepted in correct order
- Shipment requires tracking number for 'Sent' state
- Order status updates visible in storefront Order History
- Audit log records each transition with actor and timestamp (BL-ORD-001, BL-ORD-006)

Title: BOPIS - Pickup Location Map
Preconditions: Critical
Expected Result: Cart has products, multiple pickup locations exist
References:
1. Add products to cart and select Pickup at checkout
2. Open pickup location modal
3. Verify map loads with markers for all locations
4. Enter city name in search bar and verify locations filter
5. Apply 'Open Now' filter
6. Click on a location in list and verify marker highlights
7. Click 'Select' on a location
8. Verify modal closes and selected location shows in checkout
Automation Status:
- Google Maps loads with location markers
- Map interactive (zoom, pan)
- Search filters list and re-centers map
- Filters apply to location list (AND logic)
- Clicking location highlights marker and opens info window
- Info window shows: Name, Address, Phone, Hours, Availability
- 'Select' closes modal
- Selected location displayed in checkout with 'Change Location' option

Title: BOPIS - Mobile Pickup Flow
Preconditions: Mobile viewport (375x812px or iPhone), cart has products
Steps:
1. Resize to mobile viewport
2. Add products to cart
3. Select Pickup at checkout
4. Open pickup location selector
5. Interact with map (pinch zoom, tap markers)
6. Select location
7. Complete checkout
Expected Result:
- Pickup location selector optimized for mobile
- Touch interactions work: pinch zoom, tap markers
- Location list scrollable
- Select button tappable (44x44px minimum)
- No horizontal scrolling required
- Checkout completes on mobile

Title: B2B - Multi-Organization Cart Isolation
Preconditions: User belongs to 2+ organizations
Steps:
1. Log in as user with multiple organizations
2. Switch to Org A using org selector in header
3. Add 3 products to cart while in Org A
4. Switch to Org B
5. Verify Org B cart is separate (empty or different items)
6. Add products to Org B cart
7. Switch back to Org A
8. Verify Org A cart intact
Expected Result:
- Organization selector shows all user's orgs
- Switching org switches cart context
- Org A's items NOT visible in Org B
- Cart items persist when switching back to Org A
- Pricing reflects each org's contract prices (BL-B2B-001, BL-CART-005)

Title: B2B - Organization Context Swap (All 6 Dimensions)
Preconditions: User member of 2+ organizations with different configs (prices, theme if WL enabled)
Steps:
1. Log in as Org A member
2. Note: cart items, visible addresses, product prices, white-label theme
3. Switch to Org B
4. Verify cart changed to Org B's cart
5. Verify addresses changed to Org B's address book
6. Verify prices changed to Org B's price list
7. Verify theme updated if white labeling enabled
8. Switch back to Org A and verify all contexts restored
Expected Result:
- Cart swaps atomically to new org's cart
- Addresses from Org A not visible under Org B
- Prices reflect Org B's contract list (BL-B2B-002)
- Theme/branding updates if white labeling enabled
- Quotes scope to current org
- Switching back restores all Org A's context (BL-CROSS-008)

Title: B2B - Organization-Specific (Contract) Pricing
Preconditions: Org A has a custom price list with Product X at $50. Store default has Product X at $75.
Steps:
1. Sign in as Org A member
2. Navigate to Product X
3. Note displayed price
4. Sign out and sign in as a non-org (personal) user
5. Navigate to Product X
6. Note displayed price
Expected Result:
- Org A member sees contract price: $50
- Non-org user sees store default price: $75
- Org A member adds to cart — cart uses $50
- Non-org user's cart uses $75
- Product not in Org A's price list falls back to store default (BL-PRICE-007, BL-B2B-002)

Title: B2B - Quick Order Entry
Preconditions: B2B user logged in with organization context
Steps:
1. Navigate to Quick Order page
2. Enter valid SKUs and quantities:
   - Row 1: SKU-001, Qty: 10
   - Row 2: SKU-002, Qty: 5
   - Row 3: INVALID-SKU, Qty: 1
3. Click 'Add to Cart'
Expected Result:
- Quick Order form displays with SKU and Quantity rows
- Valid SKUs validate against catalog (product name shown)
- Invalid SKU shows error: 'Product not found'
- Valid rows added to cart
- Invalid rows highlighted
- Cart updates with correct quantities

Title: B2B - Company Members Management
Preconditions: Organization admin logged in
Steps:
1. Navigate to Company Members page
2. Verify members list with Name, Email, Role, Status
3. Click 'Invite Member' button
4. Enter email: newmember@example.com and select role: Employee
5. Click 'Send Invitation'
6. Verify invitation email received
Expected Result:
- Members list shows all org members
- 'Invite Member' button visible for org admins

Title: B2B - Quote Request Flow
Preconditions: B2B user with 'Quotes' feature enabled in store settings
Steps:
1. Add products to cart
2. Click 'Request Quote' button
3. Add message/notes and submit quote request

7. Click 'Convert to Order'
8. Complete checkout at quoted price
Expected Result:
- 'Request Quote' button visible (feature enabled in store)

- Admin can approve with price adjustments
- Approved quote shows in storefront with seller price
- Convert to Order creates checkout at quoted prices
- Expired quotes cannot be converted (BL-B2B-003)

Title: B2B - Member Role Feature Visibility

Title: Tiered/Volume Pricing - Tier Activates at Threshold
Preconditions: Product configured with tier pricing: 1-9 units = $10, 10+ units = $8
Steps:

2. Add 9 units to cart
3. Verify price = $10/unit (line total = $90)
4. Add 1 more unit (qty=10)
5. Verify price drops to $8/unit for ALL 10 units
6. Verify line total = $80 (not $90+$8)
Expected Result:
- Price changes at exact threshold quantity
- All units in the line use the same tier price (no split pricing)
- Line total = qty x tier price
- 'From $X' on listing matches lowest tier (BL-PRICE-004)

Title: Order Placement Side Effects - Inventory and Email
Preconditions: Product with known stock count. Order about to be placed.
Steps:

2. Place order for 2 units
3. Verify confirmation page shows order number
4. In Admin: check product inventory (should decrease by 2)

6. Verify email content matches order (number, items, total, shipping address)
Expected Result:
- Inventory decremented by ordered quantity immediately after order
- Exactly 1 confirmation email received (not 0, not 2)
- Email content matches Admin order detail (BL-NOTIF-001, BL-NOTIF-002)
- Order appears in customer Order History
- Cart is cleared
- All side effects complete — no partial execution (BL-CROSS-005)

Title: Minimum Order Amount Enforcement
Preconditions: Store configured with minimum order amount (e.g., $50)
Steps:

5. Verify checkout unblocked
Expected Result:
- 'Place Order' disabled or blocked when below minimum
- Message shown: 'Minimum order is $50, you need $10 more'
- Minimum checked against subtotal after discounts, not grand total
- Checkout unblocks when minimum met (BL-CHK-007)

Title: Session Expiry During Checkout - Cart Preserved
Preconditions: User in checkout flow, ability to expire session (e.g., clear auth token)
Steps:

2. Manually expire session (clear auth cookies/token or wait for timeout)
3. Attempt to proceed to next step
4. Re-authenticate when prompted
5. Verify cart intact and checkout resumable
Expected Result:
- Cart contents preserved after session expiry
- Redirected to sign-in after session expires
- After re-login: cart intact with same items
- Checkout resumes from last step (BL-AUTH-001)

8. Verify 'Add to Cart' still enabled

Title: B2C Variations - Option Display and Add to Cart (Correct SKU)
Preconditions: Product with VirtoFrontend_UI_Layout=B2C property. 2+ color and size options.

4. Verify 'Add to Cart' disabled with no selections

6. Select Size: M (both selected); verify button enabled

- Color swatches are visual (not text-only)

- 'Add to Cart' enabled only when all required groups selected
- Correct variant SKU in API request (not parent SKU)

Title: B2C Variations - Price and Stock Update on Selection
Preconditions: B2C product with variants having different prices and stock levels
Steps:

Expected Result:

- Out-of-stock variant: 'Out of stock' label, 'Add to Cart' disabled

Title: B2C Variations - Image Gallery Updates on Color Selection

Title: B2C Variations - Shareable URL Deep Links to Correct Variant

Title: Coupons - Valid Coupon Applied (Storefront End-to-End)
Preconditions: Valid coupon exists in Admin (e.g., WELCOME10 - 10% off). Products in cart.

Title: Coupons - Case-Insensitive Code Acceptance

Title: Coupons - Only One Coupon Per Cart (Single-Use Enforcement)

Title: Coupons - Coupon Removed from Cart

6. Verify button appears
Expected Result:

Title: Security - Password Strength Enforcement

Title: Feature Flag Toggle - Immediate Effect Without Restart
Preconditions: Admin access to store settings. 'quotesEnabled' flag available.
Steps:
1. Ensure quotesEnabled = true in store settings
2. Verify 'Request Quote' button visible on storefront
3. Toggle quotesEnabled = false in Admin
4. Refresh storefront (no server restart)
5. Verify 'Request Quote' button disappears
6. Toggle back to true and verify button returns
Expected Result:
- Flag change takes effect on next page load (no restart needed)
- Storefront reads flags from xAPI on each page load
- Quote button appears/disappears based on flag state (BL-CROSS-006)

Title: Price List Deletion - Products Show Unavailable Not $0
Preconditions: Product with price only from one price list. Admin access.
Steps:
1. Note product URL on storefront (in-stock, purchasable)
2. In Admin: delete the price list associated with this product
3. Navigate to product on storefront (clear cache if needed)
4. Verify price display and Add to Cart state
5. Verify via xAPI: products query returns null price
Expected Result:
- Product shows 'Unavailable' or N/A — NOT $0.00
- 'Add to Cart' button disabled
- Cannot add to cart via UI or API
- Existing orders retain historical prices unchanged
- Recreating price list restores availability (BL-CROSS-001, BL-CROSS-012)

Title: Cart Price Uses Live Data Not Cached Search Price
Preconditions: Admin access. Product with a price visible on storefront.
Steps:
1. Note current product price on storefront listing ($X)
2. In Admin: increase price by $10
3. Immediately (within 60s) add the product to cart
4. Verify cart uses NEW price not cached listing price
5. Wait 120s and verify search listing also shows new price
Expected Result:
- Cart/checkout always uses server-side (current) price
- Cart does NOT use stale cached search index price
- After reindex (120s): listing price matches cart price
- Price change propagated within consistency window (BL-CROSS-002)

Title: End-to-End - Complete Purchase Flow (Full Cross-Layer Verification)
Preconditions: All layers accessible: storefront, Admin, email, DevTools
Steps:
1. Register new user (or sign in with test account)
2. Browse catalog and search for product
3. Add product to cart (verify correct SKU via Network tab)
4. Apply valid promo code
5. Proceed to checkout with delivery address
6. Select shipping method
7. Enter payment details and place order
8. On confirmation page: note order number, verify GA4 purchase event fires
9. Verify email received with correct order data
10. In Admin: verify order exists with matching total
11. Verify inventory decremented
12. Verify cart is cleared on storefront
Expected Result:
STOREFRONT: Confirmation page shows correct order number and total
EMAIL: Confirmation received within 5 minutes, content matches order
ADMIN: Order exists with matching total, status New, inventory decremented
GA4: purchase event fired with correct transaction_id, value, items
CART: Cleared after order placed
CONSOLE: No JS errors on any step
NETWORK: No 4xx/5xx errors during order flow
All six side effects complete — no partial execution (BL-CROSS-005, BL-CHK-006, BL-NOTIF-001)
